item.title: Inconsistent date portability — some date calls lack BSD fallback
item.intent: Add consistent BSD/GNU date handling throughout the script — some calls have macOS fallback (date -j) while others assume GNU date, which will break on macOS without coreutils
steps: Audit all date command invocations for BSD compatibility
Extract a portable_date() helper that handles both GNU and BSD date
Replace direct date calls with the helper where format conversion is needed
acceptanceCriteria: All date calls either use the portable helper or only use universally supported formats like +%s
